stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the fourteenth of April, 2026
Here's your fact for today: exactly seventy years ago this morning, engineers at Ampex Corporation in Redwood City, California demonstrated the world's first practical videotape recorder
Before that moment, replaying a television broadcast meant filming the screen with a film camera
Within a year, the device was in every major broadcast studio
The rotating drum-head technology that made it work is still the core principle behind every modern hard drive
Your calendar looks relatively clear today
If there's a Safe Start check-in with the North American team, it will land later this evening your time, so a good window to keep the afternoon focused
Over in Singapore, the Maritime Port Authority investigation into the Evergreen boxship Ever Lenient fire is still ongoing

Here's your fact for today: exactly seventy years ago this morning, engineers at Ampex Corporation in Redwood City, California demonstrated the world's first practical videotape recorder
Before that moment, replaying a television broadcast meant filming the screen with a film camera
Within a year, the device was in every major broadcast studio

Good morning, Sean â it's Sunday the twelfth of April, 2026
Here's one for you: sixty-five years ago this morning, Yuri Gagarin became the first human being to reach outer space
He launched at 9:07am Moscow time, completed one orbit of Earth in 108 minutes, and came home
What most people don't know is that he didn't land inside the capsule â he ejected and parachuted down separately, because the Soviets weren't confident the landing system could be trusted
He didn't know whether the hatch would even open
He found out the same way he found out everything else that day â by going anyway
Over in Singapore, Parliament has moved the Securities and Futures Amendment Bill to first reading
This sets up the regulatory framework for the Global Listing Board â SGX's joint venture with Nasdaq
